author: taulepton_
content:
Sorry for the delay on this. I've pushed updates to both kurtosis and ethereum package PR's:
- https://github.com/kurtosis-tech/kurtosis/pull/3018
- https://github.com/ethpandaops/ethereum-package/pull/1353

I've tested on lambda.ai (8xV100 GPU) using this updated network params file: https://github.com/frisitano/lighthouse/blob/feat/network-params-gpu/scripts/local_testnet/network_params_eip8025_zkboost_gpu.yaml

Change summary:
- [kurtosis] Introduced GpuConifg
- [kurtosis] Introduced configurable gpu driver in GpuConfig
- [ethereum-package] Added validation of ere servers to assert that if we have 2 gpu servers and they use gpu count we fail/error and issue message to user informing them to pin specific device id's
- [lighthouse] Update network params file to be compatible with updated kurtosis and ethereum-package.
